recommendation: Add a primary beam between columns {a} and {b}, or reduce the span to under 8m.
Cantilevered element exceeds 2.5m. Back-span analysis or counterweight required before construction.
Wall opening exceeds 50% of wall length. Verify shear capacity and consider a lintel beam above the opening.
Slab thickness appears insufficient. Minimum recommended thickness is span divided by 30.
No beam detected between columns more than 6m apart. Verify lateral bracing strategy.
